clEntries.7.5.50: v7.5.49: Added `pir_mmwave_sensor` driver for microwave motion sensors (presence_sensor_radar alternative)., Phoenix Sovereign v8.1.0 fingerprint enrichment: new manufacturer/productId combinations across multiple drivers., `button_wireless`: added SONOFF and sonoff case variations to manufacturerName matching., `plug_energy_monitor`: improved watt tracking on power clamp meter devices., `generic_
clEntries.7.5.49: New driver: presence sensor microwave (pir_mmwave_sensor). New fingerprints via Phoenix Sovereign v8.1.0. SONOFF case variations in button_wireless. Power clamp meter watt tracking improved. Flow card cleanup per PR#120.
clEntries.7.5.48: Bug fix: clamp meter watt/voltage scaling corrected. New fingerprints added across multiple drivers. Flow repair tool integrated for device/flow replacement.
clEntries.7.5.46: v7.5.46 - Maintenance release. No new devices or fixes.
clEntries.7.5.45: Bug fixes across 7 drivers including humidifier, motion_sensor_2, dimmer_dual_channel, smart_button_switch, and pet_feeder. Updated 8 device interviews. 6755 fingerprints.
clEntries.7.5.44: Bug fixes for wireless buttons, remote buttons, and scene switches. Critical runtime errors resolved in button devices.
clEntries.7.5.43: Bug fixes: wall flow cards on multi-gang switches, wireless button reliability, climate sensor battery/pressure, partial battery sensor fix. Driver updates for soil sensor, button wireless plug, curtain motors, floor heating.
clEntries.7.5.42: v7.5.41: Fixed battery endpoint scan handling for better battery device detection, Fixed Fingerbot capability registration timing (Issue #162), Added 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT sources, Improved kinetic detection for soil sensors, Added fingerprint support to soil_sensor, bulb_rgbw, climate_sensor, switch_1gang, wall_remote_2_gang, and wall_switch_1gang_1way drivers
clEntries.7.5.41: v7.5.41 - 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT. Battery endpoint scan fix, Fingerbot capability timing fix, and kinetic detection improvement for soil sensors.
